description: village in Dunn County, Wisconsin
description_wiki: Colfax is a village in Dunn County, Wisconsin, United States.

description: city in Barron County, Wisconsin, United States
description_wiki: Rice Lake is a city in Barron County in northwestern Wisconsin, United States, on the shore of the lake with the same name.

description: worldwide economic depression (1929–1939)
description_wiki: The Great Depression was a severe global economic downturn from 1929 to 1939.

description: reserve force of the United States Army and Air Force
description_wiki: The National Guard is a military reserve organization of the United States Department of Defense (DoD).

description: Louisiana National Guard installation near Pineville, LA
description_wiki: Camp Beauregard is a Louisiana National Guard installation located northeast of Pineville, Louisiana, primarily in Rapides Parish, but also extending northward into Grant Parish.

surface_forms: when the attack came on Pearl Harbor
description: 1941 Japanese surprise attack on the U.S
description_wiki: On December 7, 1941, the Empire of Japan launched a surprise military strike on the United States Pacific Fleet at its naval base at Pearl Harbor on Oahu, Hawaii.

description: light machine gun
country in Central Europe
description_wiki: Germany, officially the Federal Republic of Germany, is a country in Western and Central Europe.

description: German, Soviet, and Slovak attack on and takeover of Poland that marked the start of World War II
description_wiki: The invasion of Poland, also known as the September Campaign, Polish Campaign, and Polish Defensive War of 1939 (1 September – 6 October 1939), was a joint attack on the Republic of Poland by Nazi Germany, the Slovak Republic, and the Soviet Union, which marked the beginning of World War II. The German invasion was preceded by the Danzig crisis and began on 1 September 1939, one week after the signing of the Molotov–Ribbentrop Pact between Germany and the Soviet Union, and one day after the Supreme Soviet of the Soviet Union had approved the pact.

description: human settlement in Louisiana, United States of America
description_wiki: Camp Livingston was a U.S. Army military camp during World War II. It was located on the border between Rapides and Grant Parishes, near Pineville, 12 mi (19 km) north of Alexandria, Louisiana.

description: state of the United States of America
description_wiki: Louisiana (French: Louisiane; Spanish: Luisiana [lwiˈsjana]; Louisiana Creole: Lwizyàn) is a state in the Deep South and South Central regions of the United States.

description: U.S. military installation in Middlesex and Worcester counties, Massachusetts, United States
description_wiki: Fort Devens is a United States Army Reserve military installation in the towns of Ayer and Shirley, in Middlesex County and Harvard in Worcester County in the U.S. state of Massachusetts.

description: former US Army post in California
description_wiki: Fort Ord is a former United States Army post on Monterey Bay on the Pacific Ocean coast in California, which closed in 1994 due to Base Realignment and Closure (BRAC) action.

description: region of the Pacific Ocean south of the equator
state of the United States of America
description_wiki: Michigan (  MISH-ig-ən) is a peninsular state in the Great Lakes region of the Upper Midwestern United States.

description: country in Oceania
description_wiki: Australia, officially the Commonwealth of Australia, is a country comprising the mainland of the Australian continent, the island of Tasmania and numerous smaller islands.

description: capital city of South Australia
description_wiki: Adelaide (  AD-il-ayd; Kaurna: Tarndanya [ˈd̪̥aɳɖaɲa]) is the capital and most populous city of South Australia, as well as the fifth-most populous city in Australia.

description: modern martial art, combat and Olympic/Paralympic sport
description_wiki: Judo (Japanese: 柔道, Hepburn: Jūdō; lit. 'gentle way') is an unarmed modern Japanese martial art, combat sport, Olympic sport (since 1964), Paralympic sport (since 1988) and Commonwealth Games sport (since 1990).

description: capital city of Queensland, Australia
description_wiki: Brisbane (  BRIZ-bən; Turrbal/Yagara: Meanjin) is the capital and largest city of the Australian state of Queensland and the third-most populous city in Australia, with a population of approximately 2.8 million.

description: 1917-1967 United States Army formation
description_wiki: The United States 32nd Infantry Division was formed from Army National Guard units from Wisconsin and Michigan and fought primarily during World War I and World War II. With roots as the Iron Brigade in the American Civil War, the division's ancestral units came to be referred to as the Iron Jaw Division.

description: capital of Papua New Guinea
description_wiki: Port Moresby ( ; Tok Pisin: Pot Mosbi), also referred to as Pom City or simply Moresby, is the capital and largest city of Papua New Guinea.

description: United States Army general in WWI, WWII and Korea (1880–1964)
description_wiki: Douglas MacArthur (26 January 1880 – 5 April 1964) was an American general who served as a top commander during World War II and the Korean War, achieving the rank of General of the Army.

aliases: Army of the Greater Japanese Empire
description: ground-based armed forces of Japan, from 1868 to 1945
description_wiki: The Imperial Japanese Army (IJA) was the principal ground force of the Empire of Japan from 1871 to 1945.

description: city in Queensland, Australia
description_wiki: Townsville is a city on the north-eastern coast of Queensland, Australia.

description: former hospital
description_wiki: O'Reilly General Hospital was an army hospital created by the U.S. Government in February 1941.

description: city in Greene and Christian counites in Missouri, United States, that is the county seat of Greene County
description_wiki: Springfield is the third most populous city in the U.S. state of Missouri and the county seat of Greene County.

description: state of the United States of America
description_wiki: Indiana (  IN-dee-AN-ə) is a state in the Midwestern region of the United States.
